events.desc: First known suspected case — a health worker — reports onset of symptoms including fever, hemorrhaging, vomiting and intense malaise. The case died at a medical centre in Bunia.
WHO alerted of a high-mortality outbreak of unknown illness in Mongbwalu Health Zone, Ituri Province, DRC. Four health workers died within 4 days.
Rapid response team investigation in Mongbwalu and Rwampara health zones confirms Bundibugyo virus disease (BVD) caused by Bundibugyo virus (BDBV).
INRB Kinshasa analyzed 13 blood samples from Rwampara Health Zone, Ituri Province.

Laboratory analysis confirmed BVD in 8 of 13 samples. DRC Ministry of Health officially declares the 17th Ebola outbreak. 246 suspected cases and 80 deaths across Rwampara, Mongbwalu, and Bunia. Uganda confirms an imported case from DRC.

WHO Director-General declares a Public Health Emergency of International Concern (PHEIC) under IHR. Uganda confirms 2 imported cases from DRC in Kampala including 1 death. No licensed vaccine or therapeutics exist for Bundibugyo virus.
1 American healthcare worker and 6 high-risk contacts medically evacuated to Germany for treatment and monitoring.
US CDC and DHS implement proactive public health measures including enhanced travel screening and entry restrictions to prevent Ebola from entering the United States.
575 suspected cases and 148 deaths. 51 confirmed cases including Uganda: 5 confirmed cases and 1 confirmed death in people who travelled from DRC.
CDC reports 827 total cases (83 confirmed + 744 suspected) and 176 suspected deaths. Outbreak expands to 3rd province — Sud-Kivu newly confirmed. Uganda: 5 confirmed cases, 1 death.

nodes.label: Rwampara HZ
nodes.detail: 6 health areas affected · confirmed outbreak origin

nodes.label: Mongbwalu HZ
nodes.detail: 3 health areas affected · 4 HCWs dead by May 9

nodes.label: Bunia HZ
nodes.detail: Epicentre hub · 827 suspected cases · 176 deaths · 3 provinces

nodes.label: Kampala, Uganda
nodes.detail: 5 confirmed cases · 1 death · traced to DRC travellers

nodes.label: Germany
nodes.detail: 1 American HCW + 6 high-risk contacts evacuated · May 17 · no confirmed cases

nodes.label: United States
nodes.detail: Enhanced screening at entry points · May 18 · no confirmed cases · risk assessed as low
